text.title: IH Build-Update Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for an IH post bundle plus valid/invalid examples and forbidden patterns.

example.code: { "title": "Week 14 — first $1k MRR, here is what flipped it", "tldr": "TL;DR: hit $1k MRR week 14 after switching from generic outreach to one-niche LinkedIn DMs. Two questions for IH on what to test next.", "body": "Background: I have been building [REPLACE-PRODUCT] for 14 weeks, solo. ... [600-1200 chars of narrative tying the three numbers below to the ask] ...", "numbers": [ {"label": "MRR", "value": "$1040", "window_days": 7}, {"label": "Trial-to-paid", "value": "21%", "window_days": 7}, {"label": "DMs sent", "value": "47", "window_days": 7} ], "ask": "If you have hit $1k MRR via cold outreach, what was the message that opened the door — verbatim if possible?", "scheduled_at": "2026-05-26T13:00:00Z", "weekday_et": "tue", "hour_et": 9 }
{ "title": "x", "tldr": "Hi everyone, lots of thoughts to share.", "body": "Hi.", "numbers": [], "ask": "thoughts?", "scheduled_at": "2026-05-25T09:00:00Z", "weekday_et": "sun", "hour_et": 22 }
example.note: title too short, TL;DR missing TL;DR: prefix, body too short, numbers empty, ask too short / vague, off-slot weekday/hour.

forbidden.pattern: tldr does NOT start with "TL;DR:" (prefix missing).
ask matches one of: "thoughts?", "any feedback?", "what do you think?" (vague ask).
weekday_et != 'tue' OR hour_et NOT in [8,9,10] (off-slot publication).

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim body to nearest sentence boundary if 1200+ chars.
Replace currency symbols in number values per locale.
